display_title: Slay the Spire 2:The Future of Potions?
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 The Future of Potions?.png}} {{E|The Future of Potions?|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} that can be found in any {{2|Acts|Act}}. == Options == {{Frame|Insert Common Potion}} {{TS|negative||Lose a specified Common {{2|Potions|potion}}.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain an {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common|Common|2}} [{{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}}/{{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}}] card reward.}}
{{Frame|Insert Uncommon Potion}} {{TS|negative||Lose a specified Uncommon potion.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain an Upgraded {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}} [Attack/Skill/{{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power|2}}] card reward.}}
{{Frame|Insert Rare Potion}} {{TS|negative||Lose a specified Rare potion.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain an Upgraded {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}} [Attack/Skill/Power] card reward.}}
{{Frame|Insert Event Potion}} {{TS|negative||Lose a specified Event potion.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain an Upgraded Rare [Attack/Skill/Power] card reward.}}
* The only Event potions are {{P|Foul Potion||2}} and {{P|Glowwater Potion||2}}. {{Frame|Insert Token Potion}} {{TS|negative||Lose a specified Token potion.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain an Upgraded Common [Attack/Skill] card reward.}}
* The only Token potion is {{P|Potion-Shaped Rock||2}}. === Mechanics === * The first 3 potions in your potion slots are chosen as options to insert, prioritizing the leftmost potions. This can include multiple potions of the same rarity. * The rarity of the card reward depends on the rarity of the potion inserted. * Each option randomly specifies whether it gives an Attack, Skill, or Power card reward. == Conditions == * Only appears if you have at least 2 {{2|Potions}}. == Dialogue ==
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet. The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?
{{Frame|Insert Common Potion}}/ {{Frame|Insert Uncommon Potion}}/ {{Frame|Insert Rare Potion}}/ {{Frame|Insert Event Potion}}/ {{Frame|Insert Token Potion}}
The tablet was disgusting. There is no hope for the future.
